title: Real Estate Transfer Fee
description: Allow municipalities to impose a fee on real estate transactions over $1M, with revenue funding affordable housing
relevance_renter: Funds new affordable housing construction and preservation
relevance_owner: May slightly increase transaction costs for high-value properties

title: Tenant Right of First Refusal
description: Give tenants the right to purchase their building before it can be sold to an investor
relevance_renter: Could prevent displacement when buildings are sold to investors
relevance_owner: Restricts seller flexibility but promotes stable communities

title: Just Cause Eviction
description: Require landlords to have a valid reason for eviction, preventing no-fault evictions
relevance_renter: Directly protects against 'no cause' evictions which account for significant filings
relevance_owner: N/A for owner-occupants; landlord-owners face new restrictions

title: Condo Conversion Notification
description: Requires advance notice to tenants before condo conversion and relocation assistance
relevance_renter: Provides time and resources to find new housing
relevance_owner: Existing homeowners unaffected; prospective condo buyers see more supply

title: Corporate Ownership Transparency
description: Require disclosure of beneficial owners of LLCs purchasing residential property
relevance_owner: Increases market transparency for all buyers
